name: AppFolio MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for AppFolio — the cloud-based property management software for real estate. Enables AI agents to manage rental properties, tenants, leases, maintenance requests, financial reports, and owner statements through the AppFolio API — supporting AI-driven property management workflows.
use_cases: Querying tenant and property data from AI property management assistant agents
Managing maintenance requests and work orders from operations automation agents
Accessing financial reports and owner statements from property accounting agents
Building AI-driven rental workflow automation with AppFolio data
not_for: Teams not using AppFolio (Yardi, Buildium, or other property management software)
Personal real estate without AppFolio subscription (enterprise-focused)
best_when: A property management company using AppFolio wants AI agents to automate tenant communications, maintenance workflows, and financial reporting tasks.
avoid_when: You use Yardi, Buildium, or other property management platforms. AppFolio is subscription-based and US-focused.

auth.notes: AppFolio API client ID and secret required. AppFolio API access requires application to AppFolio's API partner program.

pricing.notes: AppFolio is a paid subscription service. API access requires API partner program enrollment. MCP server is free open source (community).

performance.rate_limits: AppFolio API rate limits — typically 200 requests/minute

known_agent_gotchas: AppFolio API access requires enrollment in their API partner program — not publicly open
Tenant and financial data is highly sensitive — implement strict access controls
Community MCP implementation — not official AppFolio product
Property management operations have real-world effects on tenants and leases
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Tenant personal data and financial records are sensitive. AppFolio API access gated. SOC2 compliance. HTTPS. Treat tenant data per applicable housing regulations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Tenant PII and financial data. SOC2. HTTPS. Sensitive housing data — applicable privacy regulations.
